summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Multi-File Cross-Pollination Engine for AdsGupta. All 15 features tested and working correctly. Backend API (8/8 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all core features verified). File upload, auto-detection, cross-pollination insights, simulation modal, and lead capture all functioning as expected.

minor.issue: Fixed - was using boolean check on database object instead of 'is None' check

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warning - <span> cannot be child of <option> in select dropdowns. This is a minor HTML validation issue that doesn't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: NeuralMapPage.jsx select dropdowns have React hydration warnings due to span wrappers around option elements
test_credentials: No credentials needed for Multi-Vault/Neural Map testing
seed_data_creation: Created test CSV files for Business Report, Search Term, and Settlement reports. Created test leads during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-Vault and Neural Map pages are fully functional. All 15 features from the requirements tested and passing. Test CSV files created at /tmp/test_csv_files/ for future testing.
passed_tests: Backend Tests (8/8 passed):
- Health endpoint working
- Lead capture success with valid email
- Lead capture duplicate email returns 'Welcome back!'
- Lead capture invalid email format rejected (422)
- Lead capture missing email rejected (422)
- Lead capture with default values works
- Lead count endpoint returns count
- Lead capture works for different sources (neural_map, multi_vault, etc.)
Frontend Tests (all passed):
- Multi-Vault page at /multi-vault loads correctly
- File upload accepts CSV files
- Report type auto-detection works (Business Report, Search Term, Settlement)
- Cross-pollination indicators turn green when required files uploaded
- Begin Quantum Analysis button appears after files uploaded
- Processing Matrix animation shows 8 steps (Parsing, Detecting, Cleaning, Merging, Correlating, Running AI Agents, Generating Insights, Building Neural Map)
- Redirect to /neural-map after processing
- Neural Map shows unified record count (5) and cross-referenced count (4)
- Interactive scatter plot with X, Y, Size dropdowns working
- Smart Suggest shows alarming correlations
- Cross-Pollination Insights cards display correctly (True Profit Audit, PPC Cannibalization, Inventory-Ad Velocity, ROAS Leak, Price Elasticity)
- True Profit Audit calculates net profit: $12460.25 (96.7% margin)
- PPC Cannibalization shows AdsGupta Alert: 4 SKUs with -$280 waste
- Run 1,000 Simulations button triggers simulation modal
- Simulation modal shows Golden Path with +23% ROAS, $377 savings, 93% confidence
- Simulation shows 5-step action plan
- Email My Audit button opens lead capture modal
- Lead capture modal shows 2 profit leaks count
- Lead capture form submits to /api/leads/capture endpoint
- Lead capture shows 'You're In!' success message
- Back to Vault navigation works
fixes_applied: Fixed /app/backend/routes/leads.py - changed 'if not db:' to 'if db is None:' for database object check

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all processing is client-side with real MongoDB for lead capture
